course_description.overview: The 130km Gran Fondo starts at Rambla de Carrasco, follows the coastline for 2km, heads northeast through Barros Blancos and Santa Rosa, returns seaside for 30km with an intermediate sprint, and finishes with 15km along the coastline. Flat and fast profile with max elevation 74m.[1]

key_segments.name: San Jacinto Climb
key_segments.description: Short climb at km71; mountain award for first rider.[1]

key_segments.name: Feed Zone 1
key_segments.description: First feedzone in Santa Rosa area.[1]

key_segments.name: Intermediate Sprint
key_segments.description: Sprint along the sea before final coastal stretch.[1]

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Predominantly flat with minor rolling terrain and one short climb; ideal for speed rather than climbing efforts. Mediofondo option (60km, 239m elevation) available.[1]

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Montevideo's international airport; event starts in city center at Rambla de Carrasco, easily accessible.[1]
logistics.accommodation: Montevideo offers hotels in Ciudad Vieja, near Rambla, and modern areas; day trips to Colonia del Sacramento or Punta del Este possible.[1]
logistics.registration_details: UCI Gran Fondo World Series qualifier; register via www.espanolagranfondo.uy. Distances: 60km mediofondo, 130km granfondo.[1][4]
logistics.bike_logistics: Road bikes recommended for paved coastal and inland roads; standard transport to Uruguay.[1]
logistics.local_considerations: Relaxed city with Rambla promenade for cycling; enjoy Mercado del Puerto for parrillas, Feria Tristán Narvaja market (Sundays). September weather mild.[1]

final_verdict.one_liner: Flat, fast UCI qualifier along Montevideo's stunning Rambla coastline – Uruguay's premier road gran fondo.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Speed-focused road cyclists seeking UCI Worlds qualification without major climbs; beginners to elites in mild South American setting.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes for qualifiers and coastal scenery fans; accessible prestige event in growing series.
pro_tips: Prioritize aero position for flat speed.
Explore Rambla and Mercado del Puerto post-race.
Opt for granfondo to chase mountain award at km71.
Book early for September in popular Montevideo.

youtube_data.search_query: Gran Fondo Montevideo gran fondo cycling Montevideo

videos.title: Gran Fondo Movistar Montevideo
videos.description:
Luego de una exitosa primera edición en Punta del Este, Gran Fondo Movistar desembarca en Montevideo el próximo 26 de abril para ofrecerles a todos los amantes del ciclismo una nueva experiencia. 

Este nuevo evento se desarrollará al más alto nivel y ofrecerá a los corredores la posibilidad de  optar entre dos distancias, en las cuales podrán disfrutar de desafiantes recorridos por parte de los departamentos de Montevideo y Canelones. 

Sabemos que te mueve la pasión y el deseo de superación. Vení a vivir una nueva experiencia dentro del pelotón de Gran Fondo Movistar Montevideo.
